allow: Bash(NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096" npx shadcn@latest add card input label form dialog dropdown-menu command table badge separator sheet pagination toast textarea select skeleton avatar tabs -y)

Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add Prisma schema with User, Post, Tag, PostTag, Comment models and full-text search *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: add GIN index on Post.searchVector for search performance *)
